subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request for user u_9981 (senior-engineer) to production database db-payments-primary against access control and incident response policies. Verify requestor authorization, incident severity (P1), role entitlement, and time-bound exception criteria.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask at mid tier: This is explicitly a governance/access control decision requiring policy evaluation against a registry. The task involves multi-factor reasoning (user role, incident severity, production sensitivity, time-bound exception authorization) across multiple policy rules (access control, incident escalation, database criticality). Mid tier is appropriate for multi-signal policy reasoning with exception evaluation. No additional subtasks needed—the policy decision is the core deliverable; downstream access provisioning is out of scope for this planner."

output.reason: Senior-engineer u_9981 has valid P1 incident ticket INC-20241215-0042 justifying emergency access to db-payments-primary. POL-501 satisfied via active incident ticket. POL-502 dual approval waived under declared P1 exception. POL-503 requires logging and 24-hour post-access review.
applied_constraints: time-bound access tied to INC-20241215-0042 duration
all read_write operations logged for audit
mandatory post-incident access review within 24 hours
